placements.graduate_outcomes_note: Data based on the 2023-24 academic session with B.Tech CSE achieving the highest individual package and placement rate.

parsed_json.placement_highlights: NIT Trichy maintained a robust 88.9% overall placement rate for the 2024 batch, with the highest package reaching 64 LPA in the B.Tech CSE branch. The institute remains the top-ranked NIT in NIRF 2024 rankings, attracting over 220 companies across diverse sectors including IT, finance, and core engineering.

infrastructure.details: A modern, large-scale lecture hall complex for postgraduate and general classes.
The primary computing hub with high-capacity LAN network and advanced laboratory facilities.
A major administrative and event space on campus.
Includes facilities for badminton, basketball, cricket, football, tennis, hockey, and a swimming pool.
Multiple SPV power plants (10 kWp and 100 kWp) located above the Admin, IT, and Lecture Hall blocks.
On-campus health center providing medical services to students and staff.
A dedicated space for extracurricular activities, clubs, and student organizations.
Features a Post Office, State Bank of India branch with ATM, Book Stall, and Co-op Stores.

hostel_details.type: A total of 22 boys' hostels and 6 girls' hostels providing single, double, triple, and four-seater room configurations.

library_details.journals: Subscribes to 83-84 print periodicals and maintains a holding of 17,690 back volumes of journals.

transport_details.routes: Shuttle services within campus, hostel-to-exam center trips, and student/staff service trips (SSST) to Tiruchirappalli city.

parsed_json.fees_note: Fees are for General/OBC-NCL candidates. B.Tech tuition is ₹62,500 per semester; PG (M.Tech/MCA) tuition is ₹35,000 per semester. Hostel fees include establishment, rent, and mess advance, typically paid per semester.

scholarships_detail.name: Full Remission of Tuition Fee
scholarships_detail.eligibility: B.Tech/B.Arch students with family income < 1.00 lakh p.a.

scholarships_detail.name: 2/3rd Remission of Tuition Fee
scholarships_detail.eligibility: B.Tech/B.Arch students with family income between 1.00 lakh and 5.00 lakh p.a.
